name: Crock Pot Roast Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Place the chuck roast in a roasting pan and bake in the preheated oven for one hour.
3. Remove the roast from the oven and transfer it to the crockpot.
4. Add the contents of the two French Onion Soup cans, beer, whiskey, and beef bouillon cubes to the crockpot with the roast.
5. Stir gently to combine all ingredients.
6. Cover and cook on low for 4-5 hours or until the meat is tender.
7. The roast can be cut into chunks if needed to fit in the crockpot.
8. Serve the roast on buns with Au Jus, or serve it over potatoes and vegetables.
